# neon_database (Resource)

Manages a Neon database.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_database" "example" {
  project_id = neon_project.example.id
  branch_id  = neon_branch.example.id
  name       = "mydb"
  owner_name = neon_role.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `name` (String) The database name.
- `owner_name` (String) The name of the role that owns the database.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (Number) The database ID.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import neon_database.example <project_id>/<branch_id>/<database_name>
```
